name: quicknote
title: QuickNote
description: Quickly add timestamped reflections to your Obsidian daily note
author: JMitnik

commands.name: quicknote-to-daily-note
commands.title: Quicknote to Daily Note
commands.subtitle: QuickNote
commands.description: Add a timestamped note under a topic in your Obsidian daily note

preferences.name: dailyNotesFolder
preferences.title: Daily Notes Folder
preferences.description: Subfolder within the vault where daily notes are stored

preferences.name: notesHeading
preferences.title: Notes Heading
preferences.description: The H2 heading text to look for (e.g. 'Notes' matches '## Notes' or '## ✍️ Notes')

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
